reviews.comment:
Ojo cuando cargue nafta una moto antas que tu auto , el surtidor queda cargado con 3 o 4 litros , la gente no se baja del auto , lo vi el 5/8 por la mañana , miren siempre que el surtidor esté en 0 !!!! Los playeros muy amables pero ..............

(Translated by Google)
Be careful when filling up a motorcycle before your car; the pump will only hold 3 or 4 liters, and people won't even get out of their cars. I saw it on August 5th in the morning. Always check that the pump reads 0! The attendants are very friendly, but...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhcmF5Mkh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros para atender la demanda. Se producen constantemente colas que molestan el tránsito y a la gente que pasa por el lugar

(Translated by Google)
There are not enough beachgoers to meet the demand. Constant lines form, disrupting traffic and people passing by.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxa19mVENBEAE

reviews.comment:
Si bien está en una zona céntrica, no tuvimos que hacer fila.
En el horario que fuimos había 3 playeros sirviendo nafta y tardaron bastante en atendernos, tanto que el auto que estaba en la siguiente despachador se empezó a quejar. No es la primera vez.
De todas maneras fueron muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Although it's in a central area, we didn't have to wait in line. When we went, there were three attendants pumping gas, and they took quite a while to serve us—so long, in fact, that the car at the next pump started complaining. It's not the first time. However, they were very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxdGFtTWlRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Promotions and discounts for members. Great customer service. Delicious coffee and a central location.
